//: Pi settings drop-in for the artifact-first skill suite. Skills load via the Agent Skills standard (name+description at startup, body on demand, /skill:<name> to invoke). Extension packages are TypeScript, loaded by Pi via jiti (no build step). Paths are absolute because this is the global file at ~/.pi/agent/settings.json — the shipped relative paths in packages/pi-config/settings.json assume the monorepo root.

subagents.//: explore is read-only by allowlist; grant it extra READ-ONLY tools here. This example grants the lsp navigation set. researcher is read-only + web (web_search/web_fetch). general gets every discovered tool automatically; add names to excludeExtraTools to take some away.

researcher.//: read-only + web research. web_search / web_fetch come from separate Pi extensions (e.g. amosblomqvist/pi-config: extensions/web-search, extensions/web-fetch) dropped into ~/.pi/agent/extensions/. If they aren't installed, researcher degrades to the core read-only tools. Grant extra READ-ONLY tools here.

statusline.//: Absolute degradation budget: >effectiveLimit tokens = caveman. Thresholds are fractions of the limit. Env EFFECTIVE_LIMIT / Z_* override.

modelPresets.//: Coding preset set: default, fast-codex, coding-fallback, deepseek-v4-flash, deep-reasoning. See packages/model-presets/ for the catalog parser and activation flow.

lsp.//: Add or override language servers without touching the Extension package dir; merged over the shipped servers.json. Example: "zig": { "cmd": "zls", "args": [], "extensions": [".zig"] }
